sql_array: CREATE TABLE t_arr (arr Array(Tuple(subcolumn1 UInt32, subcolumn2 String))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn1') AS col1, getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn2') AS col2 FROM t_arr WHERE getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn1') != 1;
CREATE TABLE another_arr (id UInt32, values Array(Tuple(val1 String, val2 UInt32))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;

SELECT a.id, getSubcolumn(a.values, 'val2') AS val2_sub, (SELECT AVG(getSubcolumn(values, 'val2')) FROM another_arr WHERE getSubcolumn(values, 'val2') != 0) AS avg_val FROM another_arr a GROUP BY a.id HAVING val2_sub != avg_val;
SELECT a.id, getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn1') AS col1 FROM t_arr WHERE (SELECT COUNT() FROM another_arr WHERE getSubcolumn(values, 'val1') != 'Hello') > 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT Arr, getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn1') AS extracted_col FROM t_arr WHERE getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn2') != 'Hello';
ALTER TABLE temp_table ADD COLUMN new_col UInt32;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT [1, 2, 3] AS Arr, getSubcolumn(arr, 'subcolumn1') FROM t_arr;
SELECT DISTINCT extracted_col, new_col FROM temp_table WHERE new_col IS NULL OR extracted_col != 2;
